skill.name: research-interviewer
skill.author: Agentient
skill.description: Systematic knowledge elicitation through structured interviewing with epistemic confidence tracking, MECE coverage verification, and bias-protected questioning. PROACTIVELY activate for: (1) Gather research requirements, (2) Elicit problem statements, (3) Extract domain knowledge, (4) Clarify research goals, (5) Generate requirements through discovery. Triggers: "interview me", "elicit knowledge", "extract information", "research interview", "gather requirements", "conduct interview", "knowledge extraction"
